summary: PASS. The cross-measure-gap-closure feature successfully implements gap closure percentage calculation and reporting. Measured throughput of 51.72 tok/s achieves 81.5% gap closure, exceeding the 75% target (48.83 tok/s threshold). Created benchmark script tests/val_cross_gap_closure.py for automated validation and comprehensive report bench/val_cross_004_gap_closure_report.md documenting the analysis.

issues.description: Benchmark script requires 5-10 minutes to run due to model loading time. Timeout occurred during initial deployment test.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider caching model weights or using shorter benchmark for CI validation

recommendations: Allreduce micro-optimization (79µs → 60µs per call): +2-3 tok/s potential
Fix M2 fused GEMV kernel regression: +2-4 tok/s potential
AWQ model support: +5-8 tok/s potential (requires AWQ-quantized model)
